scopeOfWork:
HANDS Logistics will fabricate the custom build elements specified in this proposal at our Las Vegas facility. Scope includes design refinement from client-provided specs, sourcing of all materials, fabrication and finishing, in-house QA and photo recap, and delivery.

Materials and finishes are itemized in the line-item breakdown. Final design approval is required 14 days before the build's delivery date to maintain the schedule.
paymentTerms: 50% deposit due on acceptance via PayPal invoice. Balance net 15 from event end date. Late balance subject to 1.5%/mo finance charge. Cancellations within 7 days of event subject to 50% retention of total.
